# Jelly-Claude ‚Äî Agent Context

Multi-chain AI coding agent for Solana, BNB Chain, Base, Hyperliquid, Polymarket, Kalshi, predict.fun, and more.

---

## Wallets (auto-generated by setup.sh)

| Chain | File |
|-------|------|
| Solana | `~/.jelly-claude/wallets/solana.json` |
| EVM (BNB / Base / Polygon) | `~/.jelly-claude/wallets/evm.json` |

Load Solana wallet:
```javascript
import { readFileSync } from "fs";
import { homedir } from "os";
const kp = JSON.parse(readFileSync(`${homedir()}/.jelly-claude/wallets/solana.json`, "utf8"));
```

Load EVM wallet:
```javascript
const evm = JSON.parse(readFileSync(`${homedir()}/.jelly-claude/wallets/evm.json`, "utf8"));
const { address, privateKey } = evm;
```

---

## API Keys

All keys are stored at `~/.jelly-claude/.keys`. Load with:
```javascript
import { readFileSync } from "fs";
const keys = Object.fromEntries(
  readFileSync(`${homedir()}/.jelly-claude/.keys`, "utf8")
    .split("\n").filter(l => l.includes("="))
    .map(l => l.split("=").map(s => s.trim()))
);
```

Key names in `.keys`:
- `POLYMARKET_API_KEY` / `POLYMARKET_SECRET` / `POLYMARKET_PASSPHRASE`
- `KALSHI_API_KEY` / `KALSHI_API_SECRET`
- `PREDICT_API_KEY` ‚Äî predict.fun mainnet API key (request via Discord: discord.gg/predictdotfun)
- `HELIUS_API_KEY` ‚Äî Solana RPC (helius.xyz)
- `BNBCHAIN_API_KEY`

---

## Skills Location

Skills are installed at `~/.claude/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`.

Invoke a skill: reference its SKILL.md ‚Äî Claude reads it automatically when mentioned.

Available skills (after install-all.sh) ‚Äî 28 total:
- `base-skill` ‚Äî Base chain DEX (Aerodrome, Uniswap V3)
- `binance-skills-hub` ‚Äî Binance CEX market data, spot trading, BSC token audits
- `birdeye-skill` ‚Äî Token analytics (Birdeye API)
- `bnb-trading-skill` ‚Äî BNB Chain DEX trading
- `bnb-wallet-skill` ‚Äî BNB Chain wallet operations
- `bnbchain-mcp-skill` ‚Äî BNB Chain MCP server integration
- `dexscreener-skill` ‚Äî New pair discovery (DexScreener)
- `helius-skill` ‚Äî Solana RPC, webhooks, DAS API
- `hyperliquid-skill` ‚Äî Hyperliquid perps trading
- `jelly-skill` ‚Äî Live DeFi data (jellychain.fun)
- `jupiter-skill` ‚Äî Solana swaps, DCA, limit orders
- `kalshi-skill` ‚Äî Kalshi binary contracts (fiat)
- `metaplex-skill` ‚Äî Solana NFT minting (Metaplex)
- `meteora-skill` ‚Äî Solana DLMM liquidity
- `polymarket-skill` ‚Äî Polymarket prediction markets (Polygon)
- `predict-fun-skill` ‚Äî predict.fun CLOB prediction markets (BNB Chain, USDT)
- `prediction-skill` ‚Äî Prediction market patterns and Jelly Score framework
- `pumpfun-skill` ‚Äî pump.fun token launches
- `raydium-skill` ‚Äî Solana AMM and CLMM pools
- `solana-common-errors` ‚Äî Solana error reference and fixes
- `solana-compatibility-matrix` ‚Äî Package version compatibility
- `solana-confidential-transfers` ‚Äî Token-2022 confidential transfers
- `solana-frontend-kit` ‚Äî Solana wallet UI integration
- `solana-idl-codegen` ‚Äî Anchor IDL client generation
- `solana-security-checklist` ‚Äî Solana program security audit
- `solana-testing-strategy` ‚Äî LiteSVM / Mollusk testing patterns
- `solana-trading-skill` ‚Äî General Solana trading patterns
- `solana-wallet-skill` ‚Äî Solana wallet management

For full descriptions, required keys, and use cases ‚Üí see `SKILLS.md` in this directory.

---

## Agent Templates

Agents are at `~/.claude/agents/<agent-name>.md`. Invoke inside Claude Code with:
```
/agent <agent-name>
```

All 28 agents:
| Agent | Use case |
|-------|----------|
| `airdrop-hunter` | Find and claim Solana airdrops |
| `base-dex-trader` | Swaps on Base (Aerodrome, Uniswap V3) |
| `birdeye-analyst` | Token analytics and signals |
| `bnb-data-fetcher` | BNB Chain on-chain data queries |
| `bnb-dex-trader` | PancakeSwap and BNB DEX trading |
| `cross-chain-bridge` | Bridge assets between chains |
| `dexscreener-scanner` | New token pair discovery |
| `four-meme-launcher` | Launch meme tokens on four.meme (BSC) |
| `hyperliquid-trader` | Perps on Hyperliquid |
| `jelly-predictions-agent` | On-chain data ‚Üí Polymarket/Kalshi signals |
| `jupiter-trader` | Solana swaps and DCA |
| `kalshi-trader` | Kalshi binary bets (fiat) |
| `meteora-launcher` | Solana DLMM liquidity provisioning |
| `mev-arbitrage` | Solana MEV and arbitrage |
| `multisig-manager` | Solana multisig (Squads) |
| `nft-minter` | Mint NFTs with Metaplex |
| `on-chain-analyst` | On-chain data analysis |
| `orca-market-maker` | Orca Whirlpool market making |
| `polymarket-trader` | Polymarket trades (Polygon/USDC) |
| `portfolio-tracker` | Track portfolio across chains |
| `predict-fun-trader` | predict.fun CLOB trading (BNB/USDT) |
| `prediction-market-monitor` | Monitor prediction market prices |
| `pump-launcher` | Launch tokens on pump.fun |
| `raydium-lp` | Raydium AMM/CLMM liquidity |
| `solana-data-fetcher` | Solana on-chain data queries |
| `token-security-auditor` | Rug-pull and honeypot detection |
| `wallet-watcher` | Whale wallet monitoring |
| `yield-optimizer` | DeFi yield optimization |

For full descriptions, required skills/keys, and example prompts ‚Üí see `AGENTS.md` in this directory.

---

## Protocol Quick Reference

| Protocol | Chain | Purpose |
|----------|-------|---------|
| Jupiter | Solana | Best-route swap aggregator |
| Raydium | Solana | AMM + CLMM liquidity pools |
| Meteora | Solana | DLMM dynamic liquidity |
| Orca | Solana | Whirlpool concentrated liquidity |
| pump.fun | Solana | Meme token launches (bonding curve) |
| Aerodrome | Base | Native Base DEX (ve(3,3) model) |
| Uniswap V3 | Base / ETH | Concentrated liquidity |
| Hyperliquid | L1 | Onchain perps (USDC margin) |
| Polymarket | Polygon | Prediction markets (USDC) |
| Kalshi | Off-chain | Regulated binary contracts (USD) |
| predict.fun | BSC | CLOB prediction markets (USDT, BNB Chain) |
| PancakeSwap | BSC | BNB Chain AMM |
| four.meme | BSC | BSC meme token launches |

---

## Prediction Markets ‚Äî Quick Comparison

| Platform | Chain | Collateral | KYC | Key |
|----------|-------|------------|-----|-----|
| Polymarket | Polygon | USDC | No | `POLYMARKET_API_KEY` |
| Kalshi | Off-chain | USD (fiat) | Yes (US) | `KALSHI_API_KEY` |
| predict.fun | BNB Chain | USDT | No | `PREDICT_API_KEY` |

---

## Common RPC Endpoints

| Chain | RPC |
|-------|-----|
| Solana | `https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com` |
| BNB Chain | `https://bsc-dataseed.binance.org` |
| Ethereum | `https://eth.llamarpc.com` |
| Base | `https://mainnet.base.org` |
| Arbitrum | `https://arb1.arbitrum.io/rpc` |
| Polygon | `https://polygon-rpc.com` |

Use Helius for Solana if you have a `HELIUS_API_KEY` ‚Äî much faster:
`https://mainnet.helius-rpc.com/?api-key=<key>`

---

## Additional Reference Files

These files in this directory provide deeper context:

- **`SKILLS.md`** ‚Äî All 28 skills with descriptions, required keys, and use cases
- **`AGENTS.md`** ‚Äî All 28 agents with purpose, required skills/keys, and example prompts
- **`STRATEGIES.md`** ‚Äî Step-by-step trading playbooks combining multiple agents and skills
- **`TROUBLESHOOTING.md`** ‚Äî Common errors and fixes across all chains and protocols

---

## Security Rules

- **Never log or print private keys** ‚Äî not to console, not to files, not in responses
- Wallet files and `.keys` are gitignored ‚Äî never commit them
- Always show trade details (size, price, slippage, fees) before executing
- Warn users when leverage > 10x or price impact > 1%
- For predict.fun: always run `builder.setApprovals()` once before first trade
